rev-001.review: Great burgers, crispy fries, and fast delivery every time.

rev-002.review: The milkshake was excellent and the burger was still hot when it arrived.

rev-003.review: Fresh tacos with lots of flavor. The salsa had a nice kick.

rev-004.review: Pizza crust was perfect and the toppings were generous.

rev-005.review: Rich curry, warm naan, and a really satisfying portion size.

rev-006.review: Sushi was fresh and well packed. Would order again.

rev-007.review: One of the best butter chicken dishes I have had in Kelowna.

rev-008.review: Breakfast arrived quickly and the pancakes were fluffy and delicious.

rev-009.review: The ribs were tender and the BBQ sauce was smoky without being too sweet.

rev-010.review: Beautiful presentation, very fresh fish, and great portion sizes.
